data.text: P03/04 FELISIAN. 102.66 DURING LANDING ON THIS GRASSY AREA WITH
TREES THERE APPEARED TO BE A LARGE CRATER;THIS IS MORE LIKE A
VALLEY THAN A GORGE, BUT IT SEEMS LONG AND EXTENDED; THERE IS ALSO
A SHARARP DROPOFF TO THE WEST WHICH LEADS TO NOTHING REALLY; ALSO
THERE WAS A HOPPER WHO SEEMED INTENT ON MY PURSUIT OF IT. 70.48
WAS ALSO GRASSY WITH SMALL SHRUBS, AN ACTUAL GRASSY GORGE CAN BE
FOUND AT -52.-1; ANOTHER HOPPER SIGHTING. 285.119 IS BARREN, COLD
AND ROLLING GROUND, BUT THERE ARE LARGE PINNACLES DOMINATING THE
LANDSCAPE AT CONSIDERABLE DISTANCE FROM THE LANDING SITE; THERE IS
AN I8CE POND AT THEIR BASE ON THE FAR SIDE AT -85.1; A HOPPER
PASSED NEARBY ON ITS MISSION, PROBABLY TO THE ICE LAKE TO THE
SOUTH AT A DISTANCE. PRO 0.222.480 PRV 0.047.594.436 SKINNYMON
